pr.title: Remove template-hierarchy rule from project cookiecutter tier
pr.body:
## Summary
- Remove `.cursor/rules/template-hierarchy.mdc` from the nested project cookiecutter tier.
- Update placement tables in the meta and language/tool `template-hierarchy.mdc` rules to mark the project tier as **No**.

## Test plan
- [ ] Confirm baked project cookiecutters no longer include `template-hierarchy.mdc`.
- [ ] Confirm meta and language/tool tiers still ship the rule.


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: apiology
